title: esql.delete_dataset

name.description: A comma-separated list of dataset names to delete.

master_timeout.description: Period to wait for a connection to the master node.

timeout.description: The time to wait for the request to be completed.

description:
Delete ES|QL datasets.

Deletes one or more datasets used in ES|QL data federation.
If any specified dataset does not exist, the request fails and no datasets are deleted.
